zh.lifeSummary: 當Egelina de Courtenay於1226年出生在英國戴文奧可哈普頓時，她的父親Robert de Courtenay43歲，母親Mary de Vernon44歲。她與Philip de Colombières結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年之後在英國英格蘭波克夏塞頓 庫尼，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文宏尼頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Courtenay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Courtney  .

variants.name: Courtney
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Courtenay near Sens in northern France, or some other place similarly named, from the name of a Gallo-Roman landlord, Curtenus (a derivative of Latin curtus ‘short’) + the locative suffix -acum.
Irish: English surname adopted for Ó Curnáin ‘descendant of Curnán’, an Old Irish personal name based on a diminutive of corn ‘horn’.

History: A family of this name (see 1 above) can be traced back to Athon de Courtenay, who lived in Courtenay in Loiret in the early 11th century. Renaud de Courtenay held land in Devon in the 12th century, and the family later held the title of Earls of Devon following the marriage of Hugh de Courtenay to Margaret de Bohun, granddaughter of King Edward I, in 1325.

nameMeanings.name: Egelina
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the girl's name Evelyn , or a combination of Eve with the suffix -lina.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Egelina de Courtenay was born in 1226, in Okehampton, Devon, England, her father, Robert de Courtenay, was 43 and her mother, Mary de Vernon, was 44. She married Philip de Colombières. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died after 1297, in Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Honiton, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Egelina de Courtenay est née en 1226, à Okehampton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Courtenay, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Mary de Vernon, avait 44 ans. Elle a épousé Philip de Colombières. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée après 1297, à Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Honiton, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Egelina de Courtenay 1226 in Okehampton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Courtenay 43 und ihre Mutter Mary de Vernon 44. Sie hat Philip de Colombières geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb nach 1297 in Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Honiton, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina de Courtenay è nata il nel 1226 nel Okehampton, Devon, England, sua padre, Robert de Courtenay, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Mary de Vernon, aveva 44 anni. Lei sposato Philip de Colombières. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì dopo il 1297, nel Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Honiton, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Egelina de Courtenayが1226年にイギリスデボンオケハンプトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Courtenayは43歳，母Mary de Vernonは44歳であった。Philip de Colombièresと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年以後にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアスットオン コウルテナイで死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンホーニトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Egelina de Courtenay(이)가 1226년 영국 데폰 오케함프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Courtenay(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary de Vernon(은)는 44세였다. 그녀는 Philip de Colombières(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 이후 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 수턴 쿠르텐아이에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 호니턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Egelina de Courtenay nasceu em 1226, em Okehampton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Courtenay, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Mary de Vernon, tinha 44 anos. Ela casou-se com Philip de Colombières. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu após 1297, em Sutton Courtenay, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Honiton, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Egelina de Courtenay родилась в 1226 г. в местности окэамптон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Courtenay было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Mary de Vernon, 44. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Philip de Colombières. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла после 1297 г. в местности суттон коуртенеи, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности хонитон, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Philip de Colombières. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas.
